title: Conecting one contact to multiple companies

posts.author: map (map)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I am trying to build a contact list for my office and I need each contact to have all the companies he is in linked to.
I opened a column named “company” but From what I have seen I can only link one company per contact.
Is there a way to link more than one company to a contact?
thanks

posts.author: JackHeadford (Jack Headford)
posts.cookedHtml: If you set up a board for Contacts and a board for Companies then yes, once you have a board listing both then you can set up a Connect Boards column in the Contact Board for the Company Board and vice versa. Then select each contact that applies to a business and the reverse.
